vision: A mobile app for individuals to manage daily tasks efficiently through creation, completion, and organization of tasks.

epics.name: Task Creation
epics.description: Enable users to create new tasks with essential details to track their daily activities.

stories.title: Create task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a task with a title, so that I can record what I need to do.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen, When I tap the add task button and enter a title, Then a new task is created with that title
Given I am creating a task, When I leave the title empty, Then I am prevented from saving the task

stories.title: Add due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to add a due date to a task, so that I can track when it needs to be completed.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a task, When I select a due date from the date picker, Then the task is saved with that due date
Given I am creating a task, When I do not select a due date, Then the task is saved without a due date

epics.name: Task Management
epics.description: Allow users to update task status and remove tasks they no longer need.

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task, When I tap the complete button, Then the task is marked as complete
Given I have a complete task, When I tap the complete button, Then the task is marked as incomplete

stories.title: Delete a task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove tasks I no longer need.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an existing task, When I tap the delete button, Then the task is removed from the list
Given I tap delete on a task, When I confirm the deletion, Then the task is permanently removed

epics.name: Task Viewing
epics.description: Provide users with the ability to view all their tasks in an organized list.

stories.title: View all tasks in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a list, so that I can see everything I need to do.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks, When I open the app, Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list
Given I have tasks with due dates, When I view the task list, Then I see the title and due date for each task

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Enable users to filter their task list to focus on specific task statuses.

stories.title: Filter tasks by incomplete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter tasks by incomplete status, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks, When I select the incomplete filter, Then I see only incomplete tasks
Given I have applied the incomplete filter, When I clear the filter, Then I see all tasks again

stories.title: Filter tasks by complete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter tasks by complete status, so that I can review what I have accomplished.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks, When I select the complete filter, Then I see only complete tasks
Given I have applied the complete filter, When I clear the filter, Then I see all tasks again
